locked_positioning.headline: AI Governance & Evidence layer for Copilot adoption
locked_positioning.buyer_line: We produce the audit trail your Copilot deployment will be asked for later.
locked_positioning.mandate: Every engagement must produce at least one signed Trust Ledger Entry (TLE v1).

next_tasks.title: Lock Trust Ledger v1.2 product blueprint and TLE examples as canonical spec
done_criteria: TLE v1 JSON Schema at docs/spec/schemas/tle-v1.schema.yaml
Three TLE examples: Go, Conditional, Rejected under docs/spec/examples/
Alignment doc maps blueprint to os/plan.json MVP criteria

next_tasks.title: Extract top 5 MVP requirements from existing noetfield markdown into os/plan.json done criteria
done_criteria: MVP requirement #1: Pre-execution governance evaluation must return a clear allow/deny/review decision before external execution
MVP requirement #2: Every evaluated intent must produce immutable audit-ready traceability with RID and exportable compliance evidence
MVP requirement #3: Product scope must explicitly exclude payment initiation, custody, settlement, routing, FX, and money transmission claims
MVP requirement #4: Pilot surface must support regulated-organization workflows without execution rights
MVP requirement #5: Boundary integrity must be enforced in product narrative and verification

backlog_on_request: Sprint backlog Weeks 0-8 with user stories
